description: Per-system integer offset to convert alanine-scan (complex-PDB author) residue numbering to apo-MD structure numbering. MD_resid = scan_resid + offset. Verified: WT residue identity matches MD structure 101/101 after applying.
verification: scan WT one-letter == MD resname at (resid+offset); 1AKI & 2JEL needed 0, others -1 to -13
